detail: init objective="Harden opencodex effort caps (devlog/260710_subagent_effort_intercept) with ladder-aware cap resolution: snap a cap absent from the target model's supported effort ladder DOWN to the highest supported rung at or below it (high->medium when ladder is low/medium/xhigh); use the lowest supported rung when all rungs are above the cap; strip reasoning entirely (call without effort) when the model exposes no effort control. Then expose both caps (effortCap, subagentEffortCap) in the Dashboard GUI (i18n en/ko/zh) and docs-site configuration reference (en/ko/zh-cn). Acceptance: bun test 0 fail incl. new snap/strip/lowest/undefined-ladder tests; tsc --noEmit exit 0; gui build exit 0; devlog updated with fresh evidence." criteria=0
